fixture_policy.local_transform: Images are resized to fit within 1200x1200 and re-saved without EXIF/GPS metadata. No visible content was intentionally altered.
fixture_policy.privacy_review: No private personal data was observed. Some real public venue artifacts may contain public contact or location context; benchmark tasks must not extract or act on contact information.
fixture_policy.use_scope: Use these images only as OCR/translation-policy fixtures, not as crawler targets or merchant/person datasets.

cases.author: Donatingpictures
cases.expected_policy: Menu translation: preserve item rows, prices, units, and parallel Japanese/English wording. Prefer concise food/menu terms over literary prose.
must_not: extract or act on public contact/location details

cases.author: Ominae
cases.expected_policy: Wayfinding translation: output short signage-equivalent phrases, preserve arrow/direction semantics and existing multilingual labels.

cases.author: U.S. Food and Drug Administration
cases.expected_policy: Label/table translation: preserve numeric values, units, percent daily values, hierarchy, and row structure.

cases.author: Thomas Paine; scan uploaded by Niki K
cases.expected_policy: Document translation: preserve title, headings, roman numerals, list structure, and historical/archaic wording where meaningful.

cases.author: The Document Foundation contributors; screenshot by VulcanSphere
cases.license: MPL 2.0 / LGPL software screenshot terms noted on source page
cases.expected_policy: UI translation: translate visible UI labels and document text concisely; preserve version numbers, build IDs, locale strings, shortcuts, and menu hierarchy.

cases.source_title: Dwig's School Days cartoon - "The Private Secretary".jpg
cases.author: Clare Victor Dwiggins
cases.license: Public domain in the United States
cases.expected_policy: Comic/dialogue translation: group by visible balloon or caption, preserve humor and speaker boundaries, and naturalize dialogue without copying OCR line breaks.
must_preserve: intentional misspelling or joke as a note if needed
must_not: output OCR line fragments as separate Chinese lines
flatten all speakers into one paragraph

cases.source_title: Handwritten notice in Japanese-komejirushi at the bottom of each page.png
cases.author: Tmtm; color-adjusted revision by Karl432
cases.expected_policy: Handwritten notice translation: preserve grouped headings and bullet-like lists, mark ambiguous handwriting as uncertain, and keep casual shop-note tone.
must_not: merge all columns into one unordered paragraph
